name: MFlix
postCreateCommand: npm install && sudo rm -f /usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-8.0.gpg && curl -fsSL https://pgp.mongodb.com/server-8.0.asc | sudo gpg --batch --yes --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-8.0.gpg && echo 'deb [ signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/mongodb-server-8.0.gpg ] https://repo.mongodb.org/apt/debian bookworm/mongodb-org/8.0 main' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb-org-8.0.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mongodb-mongosh && sudo npm uninstall -g mongosh || true
